basic_details.job_title: CSIR NIO Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: CSIR National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR-NIO) Senior Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of CSIR-NIO. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR-NIO Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: M.Sc / M.Sc (Tech) in Geophysics / Marine Geophysics / Exploration Geophysics / Applied Geophysics with minimum 3 years research experience in relevant field Post MSc/MSc(Tech) OR MTech in Geophysics / Marine Geophysics / Exploration Geophysics / Applied Geophysics with minimum 2 years of research experience in relevant field post MTech

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR-NIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR-NIO Senior Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Senior Project Associate position at CSIR-NIO is 07 June 2026. Ensure you complete your application before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Senior Project Associate position announced by CSIR-NIO in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.Sc / M.Sc (Tech) or MTech in Geophysics or related fields with 3 or 2 years of relevant research experience, respectively, post their degree.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Senior Project Associate post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 42,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the official notification indicates that there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for CSIR-NIO Senior Project Associate jobs?
faq.answer: Applications for the Senior Project Associate position must be submitted online through the official CSIR-NIO website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The Senior Project Associate position at CSIR-NIO is a contract-based role.

faq.question: Q8. Where is CSIR-NIO located?
faq.answer: CSIR-NIO is located in Goa, and the recruitment is for candidates in this region.

faq.question: Q9. Does the notification mention any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for comprehensive information on age limits and relaxations.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Senior Project Associate recruitment at CSIR-NIO is SSP3677/3195-26.
